summary: MPP2 is the only active follow-up MPP training route; MPP1, MPP3, MPP4 and MPP5 remain background or method references.
The server may exchange code, status, errors and small results with the local workspace only through the configured Gitee Git remote.
Preserve MPP1-5 raw ssGSEA paths, standardized split labels, train-only z-score parameters and group 3/5 embargo audits; do not delete or regenerate them implicitly.
Keep the automated repair loop as a separate later task; validate Codex CLI first and retain adapter interfaces for Claude Code and other verified non-interactive CLIs.
Implement the tracked project state package, result provenance, document lifecycle, Gitee job envelopes and strict agent freshness checks while preserving the existing dirty worktree.
Simple, bounded maintenance inventory or test-audit tasks may use subagents following the global economic-worker policy; core architecture and final verification remain with the primary agent.

Repair rebuild_zscore_from_manifest.py cross-patient barcode label contamination without overwriting or deleting existing MPP1-5 assets; write only to versioned staging; require one-to-one patient+barcode validation, a hard gate on duplicate dataset labels, and a server asset audit manifest. Keep Gitee as the only server transport. Until repair evidence is imported and the gate is lifted, permit MPP2+LoRA implementation and tests only, with no smoke or formal training. After approval, rerun the same-batch MPP2 frozen baseline before a LoRA r=8 smoke capped at 3 epochs.

Activate verified repair evidence barcode-repair-20260711-d626ad8-v003 and execute the repaired-data sequence: MPP2 frozen baseline first, then LoRA r=8 smoke capped at 3 epochs. Do not rerun MPP1/3/4/5 initially. If the repaired MPP2 baseline materially degrades versus mpp2_std10val_xzy_ext_uni2h_mlp_20260706 (PCC drop >=0.05, raw MAE increase >=10%, or raw R2 drop >=0.10), pause LoRA and rerun repaired MPP1-5 frozen baselines before drawing a new cross-MPP conclusion.

Preserve training argparse option spelling exactly, keep explicit compatibility aliases only, and never let launcher event cleanup mask Python stderr or exit codes; retire failed pre-training job mpp2-repair-v003-frozen-20260711 and require a new source commit/job ID.
